name: transcribe-zh-en-srt

metadata.name: transcribe-zh-en-srt
metadata.summary: A package to process audio and generate translation from input language to target language. this package return srt format files containing english accurated translation from Chinese language to English language.

documentation:
# transcribe_zh_en_srt

## please request help from after downloading the package by running package name --help

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.load_api_key
documentation:
Load the OpenAI API key from the .env file located in the secrets directory.
If no secrets directory is provided, it will look for the .env file in the current working directory.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.separate_audio
documentation: Use Demucs to separate the audio and extract only the vocal track.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.send_audio_to_openai
documentation:
Send the audio file to OpenAI's /v1/audio/translations endpoint to get a translation/transcription
in SRT format based on the provided subtitle prompt.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.convert_to_srt
documentation: Convert the verbose JSON transcription response into SRT format.

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.format_time
documentation: Convert seconds to SRT time format: HH:MM:SS,MS

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.save_srt_file
documentation: Example of saving the SRT file after transcription:

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.parse_srt_timestamp
documentation: Helper function to parse SRT timestamp

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.format_srt_timestamp
documentation: Helper function to format timedelta to SRT timestamp format

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.estimate_audio_length
documentation: Estimate audio length based on word count (words per minute average 150)

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.fix_first_segment_start_time
documentation: Function to fix the start time of the first subtitle based on the audio length estimate

functions.name: transcribe_zh_en_srt.main.process_video_directory
documentation: Process each subdirectory under the input directory, look for audio and subtitle files.
Existing function to process the video directory
